title: Ccampbell
compiled_truth: Ccampbell is an external contact at [King & Spalding](companies/king-and-spalding). Over the corpus period (2000-11-30 to 2001-11-15), Ccampbell sent 95 and received 463 emails, totalling 558 interactions. Top correspondents: [Kay Mann](people/kay-mann) (95), [Jkeffer](people/jkeffer-kslaw) (53), [Gregorylang](people/gregorylang-paulhastings) (18), [Ben F Jacoby](people/ben-f-jacoby) (14), [Gkutzschbach](people/gkutzschbach-fulbright) (10).
